description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style desk or cabinet with a dark, stone-like top and a metallic body. The front features two sets of drawers on either side, each with two drawers and rectangular handles, providing ample storage space. The central section is recessed, allowing for legroom if used as a desk. The sides and back are solid, with a brushed metal finish that gives a utilitarian, urban appearance. The overall construction appears heavy and durable, suitable for environments like garages, workshops, or urban offices. The surface is flat and wide, making it ideal for supporting equipment, tools, or paperwork.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial desk or cabinet with a dark top and metallic body, featuring four drawers and a recessed central section. Its solid build and flat surface make it suitable for urban workspaces or garages.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sets of drawers with handles and a recessed central section.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, metallic side panel and the thickness of the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a continuous, solid metallic back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other solid side panel.
